caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the front and a black baseball cap sits in a recording studio. He wears over-ear headphones and a gold chain, positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features gold stars and the repeated text "HUSTLE". To the right, a screen displays "TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "STALIO PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. He starts by looking slightly to the left with a neutral expression, then shifts his gaze and opens his mouth as he talks. By the end of the clip, he is gesturing with his right hand and leaning forward, actively engaging in a conversation.
